questionHtml: Outline, without calculation, the change to the time period of the system for the model represented by graph B when a is large.
markschemeHtml:
time period increases ✓

 

because average ω «for whole cycle» is smaller

OR

slope / acceleration / force at large x is smaller

OR

area under graph B is smaller so average speed is smaller. ✓

meta.title: Outline, without calculation, the change to the time period of the system for the model represented by graph B when a is large.
